title: Sono Monban, Saikyou Nitsuki: Tsuihou Sareta Bougyo Ryoku 9999 no Senshi, Outo no Monban Toshite Musou suru
titleRomaji: Sono Monban, Saikyou Nitsuki: Tsuihou Sareta Bougyo Ryoku 9999 no Senshi, Outo no Monban Toshite Musou suru
titleNative: その門番、最強につき～追放された防御力9999の戦士、王都の門番として無双する～
synonyms: That Gatekeeper, Because He is the Strongest: The Exiled Warrior with 9999 Defense Power, Unmatched as the Gatekeeper of the Royal Capital
그 문지기, 최강이기에 ~추방당한 방어력 9999의 전사, 왕도의 문지기로서 무쌍한다~
synopsis: Sieg is an adventurer with an incredible defensive power, and he always uses himself to attract the monsters' attention to assist his teammates. However, the party leader just focused on offense without realizing Sieg's intention, so he kicked him out. After Sieg left, the team repeatedly failed multiple quests … At the same time, Sieg took the position of gatekeeper at the Royal Capital. Thanks to his defensive power, he was quickly promoted to division captain. His subordinates included a carefree big-breasted Swordswoman, a perverse freakish girl, and an Archer with an erratic temperament. He and the girls started slowly gaining the trust of people around them!

title: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleEnglish: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleRomaji: Shiitagerareta Tsuihou Oujo wa, Tenseishita Densetsu no Majo Deshita
titleNative: 虐げられた追放王女は、転生した伝説の魔女でした
synopsis: Princess Claudia's life should be tragic… pushed from a window by her uncle, coldly ignored, and dismissed by all. But when her past-life memories awaken, she remembers she was Adelheid, a legendary witch who once commanded legions of magicians. Now reborn, she refuses to be anything but herself: fabulously powerful and utterly carefree! (Source: Titan Manga)

title: Mietemasu yo! Aizawa-san
titleNative: 見えてますよ! 愛沢さん
synopsis: Michi has always been troubled by the fact that she can see ghosts. She pretends not to see, trying not to get involved. However, a ghost has appeared that even she cannot ignore. It is Honami Aizawa, a former member of the popular idol group De:LPhinus. She was also a classmate of Michi, and she haunts the classroom out of unfulfilled longing. Michi is determined not to get involved with ghosts, but she finds herself following Honami's childish and outlandish behavior, unable to look away from her ardent fan-service(?)....... (Source: Comic Valkyrie, translated)

title: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Exorcist In Another World
titleRomaji: Saikyou Onmyouji no Isekai Tenseiki: Geboku no Youkaidomo ni Kurabete Monster ga Yowai Sugirundaga @comic
titleEnglish: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Exorcist In Another World
titleNative: 最強陰陽師の異世界転生記 ～下僕の妖怪どもに比べてモンスターが弱すぎるんだが～
synonyms: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Onmyoji: These Monsters Are Too Weak Compared to My Youkai
The Reincarnation of the Strongest Onmyoji ~ These Monsters Are Too Weak Compared to My Youkai~
synopsis: Haruyoshi Kuga's power as the strongest exorcist is all for naught when he is betrayed by his closest ally. With his dying breath, he casts the secret Spell of Reincarnation—when he next opens his eyes, he finds himself in a different world altogether, reincarnated as Seika Lamprogue, the son of a family of magic scholars! He quickly learns that the magic in this new world is quite unlike the sorcery he learned in his past life and that he can't use it. Fortunately for him, with his mastery of curses and the hordes of youkai at his disposal, he doesn't need to. Haruyoshi (now Seika) is determined not to repeat his past mistakes in his second life by smartly laying low and avoiding flaunting his power. Yet accomplishing his goals and without drawing attention to himself proves to be easier said than done—will his powers be enough to live a happy life?! (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Farming Life in Another World
synopsis: After Hiraku dies of a serious illness, God brings him back to life, gives his health and youth back, and sends him to a fantasy world of his choice. In order to enjoy his second shot, God bestows upon him the almighty farming tool! Watch as Hiraku digs, chops
latestChapterTitle: The Village Chief and the Camping Wagon (2)

title: Henkyougurashi no Maou, Tensei shite Saikyou no Majutsushi ni Naru
titleRomaji: Henkyougurashi no Maou, Tensei shite Saikyou no Majutsushi ni Naru
titleNative: 辺境ぐらしの魔王、転生して最強の魔術師になる
synonyms: The Demon King of the Frontier Life, Reincarnated To Become the Strongest Mage ~The Former Demon King Who Grows up While Being Loved, Wants To Know Humans~
synopsis: There was a mage called "The Lone Demon King" at the frontier. He was just a creature that never grew old, but he was loved by the villagers as something of a guardian deity. However, he was destroyed by a magic organization that sees his existence as dangerous. 200 years later, he is reincarnated as the second son of an aristocrat and obtains the strongest magic power. "Let's pretend to be a human this time..." However, being a human lover, he didn't particularly think of revenge and has decided to pretend to be human in this life. In his past life, he was the guardian deity of a region, and in this life, he's a local aristocrat, but he does not know common sense. He doesn't know how to take it easy. As the second son of an aristocrat, he is loved by his family and friends, and while he is regarded as a master of magic in the magic guild, he becomes an "Immortal Mage" behind the scenes. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

Meet Kumogakure Kurou, a NEET and a Ninja. After being a long time without work, he finally receives orders from the higher ups!

title: I'm That Monster Girl You Once Helped Out: A Middle-Aged Teacher Finds Unexpected Popularity in Another World

titleNative: 「あのとき助けていただいたモンスター娘です。」異世界おっさん教師 突然のモテ期に困惑する

title: Kono Sekai de Ore dake ga (Level Up) wo Shitteiru
titleRomaji: Kono Sekai de Ore dake ga (Level Up) wo Shitteiru
titleNative: この世界で俺だけが【レベルアップ】を知っている
synonyms: Only I Know About "Leveling Up" in This World
Thế Giới Chỉ Mình Tôi Level Up
synopsis: A world where the worth of one's life is decided by one's Level. Theo, an S-Rank adventurer, had reincarnated thousand years later in a future where the people had forgotten about the power called "Level Up." In this world where a person would be Level 1 at birth, humanity is persecuted as the weakest race and the people lived everyday while fearing the danger of monsters. However, in their midst only Theo, who was chosen to be a sacrifice for the monsters, knew that humans can become the strongest because only they have the ability to Level Up.
chapterSourceTitle: Kono Sekai de Ore dake ga "Level Up" wo Shitteiru

title: Tianwai Fei Lai Bushi Xian
synopsis: The immortal cultivator Yi Genqing (the male protagonist) failed to ascend and mistakenly entered the interstellar world. He, the female protagonist Alex, and the captain of the guard Lei were swallowed by a huge and vague mysterious alien. The three woke up in a place similar to a prison and found that many strange people were imprisoned there. In order to escape, they teamed up with the perverted robot, the crazy and thrill-seeking Irlin with telekinetic ability, and the autistic but defensive Tolby. In the contradictions and conflicts, they began to be unreliable. (Source: Tencent, translated)

title: Zatsutabi
synopsis: Chika, who just started her career as a manga artist, was trying to find a right story for her first manga but her editor was rejecting all of her stories. Exhausted, Chika suddenly came up with an idea to travel somewhere. Somewhere, not here. She asked her social media followers which direction she should go. When the direction was decided, she sets out for her trip--a trip without any plans. First, she travels north--despite not knowing what awaits her, she manages to eat and see amazing things which she never expected. She stays in a fantastic place, enjoys everything. Sometimes, her friends join her trip...which she enjoys also. This is the ultimate travel manga for everyone who needs some time to forget everything. (Source: Kadokawa Global) Note: Nominated for the Tsugimanga 2020 Award in the Manga Category.

synopsis: Nonoa is an elf who works as a research assistant at the Imperial Geographic Institute. To update their maps, she and her partner Kago ride a motorcycle to survey an area where the roads are haunted by monsters and evil spirits. When Noa takes a rest to bathe in a spring, what appears in front of her...? (Source: Young King Ours GH, translated)

synopsis: Hitori Gotoh just wants to be popular, but the thought of interacting with her classmates makes her fall to pieces. Her solution-become a rock legend so cool that people approach her instead! However, while spending all of middle school in her closet shredding

title: Class de Ichiban Kawaii Gal wo Ezuke Shiteiru Hanashi
titleRomaji: Class de Ichiban Kawaii Gal wo Ezuke Shiteiru Hanashi
titleNative: クラスで一番かわいいギャルを餌付けしている話
synopsis: Sakura Kouzuki, a top-tier gyaru who's the star of the class and even works as a reader model, and Houri Kazami, who prefers talking otaku stuff with his comrades in the corner of the classroom. These two, who seem to live in completely different worlds, are actually step-siblings—and secretly live together as a couple. And none of their classmates know the truth. While Sakura sparkles at school, once she's home she relaxes completely and falls head over heels for Ori's cooking. And Houri, who’s in charge of meals, doesn’t mind one bit—— “Simmered fish is sooo good~♡” “Onii-chan's cooking really is the best~!” A sweet and fluffy feeding story about a cute gyaru and their double life at school and at home! (Source: Square Enix, translated)

titleRomaji: Hirotta Mono wa Taisetsu ni Shimashou: Korou ni Kiniirareta Otoko no Teni Monogatari
titleNative: 拾ったものは大切にしましょう～子狼に気に入られた男の転移物語～
synopsis: Iori, a hunter who is sent to another world after saving the wolf cub. In the forest where he arrives, he meets a pair of cute beastman twins and decides to live together. But these twins are super strong!? The wolf cub that was sent with him is also a "divine beast"!? A fun and fulfilling life in another world begins with Iori, who is kind-hearted but tends to get out of control when it comes to cooking, and the "important things" he has found! (Source: Alphapolis, translated)

title: Mahou wa Isekai ni Oitekimashita.: Tensai Madoushi Datta Imouto no Yowakute New Game
titleRomaji: Mahou wa Isekai ni Oitekimashita.: Tensai Madoushi Datta Imouto no Yowakute New Game
titleNative: 魔法は異世界に置いてきました。　～天才魔導士だった妹のよわくてニューゲーム～
synonyms: I Left My Magic Behind in Another World. A Terrible New Game for Little Sister Who Was Once a Genius Mage.
synopsis: Mikan, a young girl transported to a world of swords and magic, grows up to become a great mage who saves that world from crisis—only to be sent back to her hometown, Niigata. Having lost her magic and companions from the other world, Mikan becomes a shut-in. Her older brother Itsuki, who has waited ten long years for her return, does everything he can to show her the joys of this world and gently coax her outside—but will he succeed…?! (Source: Comic Gardo, Translated)

tags.name: Rehabilitation
tags.description: Prominently features the recovery of a character who became incapable of social life or work.

chapterSourceTitle: Mahou wa Isekai ni Oite Kimashita. ~Tensai Madoushi Datta Imouto no Yowakute New Game~
latestChapterTitle: 「That's Why I Want To Overcome It, My Shyness Around People」

title: Yamikin Ushijima-kun
synopsis: In recent years, Japan has become the shining light of Asia, with its noteworthy achievements in the fields of Science and Technology, Medicine and the like. But while there are a great number of rich and successful Japanese people, there are even more who're engaged in a furious struggle simply to earn their day-to-day living expenses -- all the while battling dangerous and money-consuming addictions such as gambling and alcoholism. What will these people do when they require the cash to feed the never-ending desires that are part and parcel of being human? How miserable and dangerous might their lives become if they fall into traps set by black market money-lenders to ensnare just such weak-willed individuals? Note: Won the 56th Shogakukan Manga Award for general manga in 2011. And the 23rd Japan Media Arts Festival Social Impact Award in 2020.
